Local ======= #\n","class LocalLevelModel:\n","    \"\"\"\n","    # Esta clase implementa el modelo de nivel local básico:\n","    # y[t] = mu[t] + eps[t]     (ecuación de observación)\n","    # mu[t] = mu[t-1] + eta[t]  (ecuación de estado)\n","    # donde:\n","    # eps[t] ~ N(0, sigma2_eps)\n","    # eta[t] ~ N(0, sigma2_eta)\n","    \"\"\"\n","\n","    def __init__(self):\n","        self.sigma2_eps = None  # Varianza del error de observación\n","        self.sigma2_eta = None  # Varianza del error de estado\n","\n","    def kalman_filter(self, y):\n","        \"\"\"\n","        # Implementa el filtro de Kalman para el modelo de nivel local\n","        # Parámetros:\n","        # y: serie temporal observada\n","        # Retorna:\n","        # filtered_state: estados filtrados\n","        # predicted_state: estados predichos\n","        # likelihood: log-verosimilitud\n","        \"\"\"\n","        n = len(y)\n","        filtered_state = np.zeros(n)\n","        predicted_state = np.zeros(n)\n","\n","        # Inicialización\n","        m = y[0]  # Media inicial\n","        P = 10000  # Varianza inicial grande (difusa)\n","\n","        likelihood = 0\n","\n","        for t in range(n):\n","            # Predicción\n","            if t > 0:\n","                m = a\n","                P = R\n","\n","            # Actualización\n","            v = y[t] - m\n","            F = P + self.sigma2_eps\n","            K = P / F\n","            a = m + K * v\n","            R = P - K**2 * F\n","\n","            filtered_state[t] = a\n","            predicted_state[t] = m\n","\n","            # Log-verosimilitud\n","            likelihood += -0.5 * (np.log(2*np.pi*F) + v**2/F)\n","\n","        return filtered_state, predicted_state, likelihood\n","\n","    def fit(self, y):\n","        \"\"\"\n","        # Estima los parámetros del modelo maximizando la log-verosimilitud\n","        \"\"\"\n","        def objective(params):\n","            self.sigma2_eps = np.exp(params[0])\n","            self.sigma2_eta = np.exp(params[1])\n","            _, _, likelihood = self.kalman_filter(y)\n","            return -likelihood\n","\n","        # Optimización\n","        result = minimize(objective, x0=[0, 0], method='Nelder-Mead')\n","        self.sigma2_eps = np.exp(result.x[0])\n","        self.sigma2_eta = np.exp(result.x[1])"],"metadata":{"id":"O3E2QFm4F09-","executionInfo":{"status":"ok","timestamp":1769018145075,"user_tz":300,"elapsed":13,"user":{"displayName":"LUIS ENRIQUE PUICON NOLASCO","userId":"03765176893022026448"}}},"execution_count":5,"outputs":[]},{"cell_type":"markdown","source":["**Modelo de Tendencia Local**"],"metadata":{"id":"ngEylp-RWuwF"}},{"cell_type":"code","source":["# ======= Modelo de Tendencia Local =======\n","class LocalTrendModel:\n","    \"\"\"\n","    # Implementa el modelo de tendencia local:\n","    # y[t] = mu[t] + eps[t]\n","    # mu[t] = mu[t-1] + beta[t-1] + eta[t]\n","    # beta[t] = beta[t-1] + zeta[t]\n","    \"\"\"\n","\n","    def __init__(self):\n","        self.sigma2_eps = None  # Varianza del error de observación\n","        self.sigma2_eta = None  # Varianza del error de nivel\n","        self.sigma2_zeta = None  # Varianza del error de pendiente\n","\n","    def kalman_filter(self, y):\n","        n = len(y)\n","        filtered_state = np.zeros((n, 2))  # [nivel, pendiente]\n","        predicted_state = np.zeros((n, 2))\n","\n","        # Matrices del sistema\n","        T = np.array([[1, 1],   # Matriz de transición\n","                     [0, 1]])\n","        Z = np.array([1, 0])    # Matriz de observación\n","        R = np.array([[1, 0],   # Matriz de selección\n","                     [0, 1]])\n","\n","        # Inicialización\n","        a = np.array([y[0], 0])  # Estado inicial [nivel, pendiente]\n","        P = np.eye(2) * 10000    # Matriz de covarianza inicial (difusa)\n","\n","        likelihood = 0\n","\n","        for t in range(n):\n","            # Predicción\n","            if t > 0:\n","                a = T @ filtered_state[t-1]\n","                Q = np.array([[self.sigma2_eta, 0],\n","                            [0, self.sigma2_zeta]])\n","                P = T @ P @ T.T + R @ Q @ R.T\n","\n","            predicted_state[t] = a\n","\n","            # Actualización\n","            v = y[t] - Z @ a            # Error de predicción\n","            F = Z @ P @ Z.T + self.sigma2_eps  # Varianza del error de predicción\n","            K = P @ Z.T / F             # Ganancia de Kalman\n","            a = a + K * v               # Estado actualizado\n","            P = P - np.outer(K, Z) @ P  # Covarianza actualizada\n","\n","            filtered_state[t] = a\n","\n","            likelihood += -0.5 * (np.log(2*np.pi*F) + v**2/F)\n","\n","        return filtered_state, predicted_state, likelihood\n","\n","    def fit(self, y):\n","        \"\"\"\n","        # Estima los parámetros del modelo maximizando la log-verosimilitud\n","        \"\"\"\n","        def objective(params):\n","            self.sigma2_eps = np.exp(params[0])\n","            self.sigma2_eta = np.exp(params[1])\n","            self.sigma2_zeta = np.exp(params[2])\n","            _, _, likelihood = self.kalman_filter(y)\n","            return -likelihood\n","\n","        result = minimize(objective, x0=[np.log(0.3), np.log(0.5), np.log(0.2)], method='Nelder-Mead')\n","        self.sigma2_eps = np.exp(result.x[0])\n","        self.sigma2_eta = np.exp(result.x[1])\n","        self.sigma2_zeta = np.exp(result.x[2])"],"metadata":{"id":"1lgREJ0WWtmc","executionInfo":{"status":"ok","timestamp":1769018148367,"user_tz":300,"elapsed":6,"user":{"displayName":"LUIS ENRIQUE PUICON Estacional**"],"metadata":{"id":"Kn-HIVsbgtDF"}},{"cell_type":"code","source":["class LocalLevelSeasonalModel:\n","    \"\"\"\n","    # Modelo de nivel local con tendencia y estacionalidad:\n","    # y[t] = mu[t] + s[t] + eps[t]           (ecuación de observación)\n","    # mu[t] = mu[t-1] + beta[t-1] + eta[t]   (ecuación de nivel)\n","    # beta[t] = beta[t-1] + zeta[t]          (ecuación de tendencia)\n","    # s[t] = -sum(s[t-1:t-11]) + omega[t]    (ecuación de estacionalidad)\n","    \"\"\"\n","\n","    def __init__(self, seasonal_periods=12):\n","        self.seasonal_periods = seasonal_periods\n","        self.sigma2_eps = None    # Varianza del error de observación\n","        self.sigma2_eta = None    # Varianza del error de nivel\n","        self.sigma2_zeta = None   # Varianza del error de tendencia\n","        self.sigma2_omega = None  # Varianza del error estacional\n","\n","    def kalman_filter(self, y):\n","        \"\"\"\n","        # Implementa el filtro de Kalman para el modelo estacional\n","        # Estado: [nivel, tendencia, s[t], s[t-1], ..., s[t-10]]\n","        \"\"\"\n","        n = len(y)\n","        state_dim = 2 + self.seasonal_periods - 1  # nivel, tendencia + estacionalidad\n","        filtered_state = np.zeros((n, state_dim))\n","        predicted_state = np.zeros((n, state_dim))\n","\n","        # Matriz de transición\n","        T = np.zeros((state_dim, state_dim))\n","        T[0,0] = 1  # nivel\n","        T[0,1] = 1  # tendencia afecta al nivel\n","        T[1,1] = 1  # tendencia\n","        # Componente estacional\n","        T[2:,2:] = np.eye(self.seasonal_periods-1)\n","        T[2:,-1] = -1\n","\n","        # Matriz de selección para la varianza del sistema\n","        R = np.zeros((state_dim, 4))\n","        R[0,1] = 1  # eta (nivel)\n","        R[1,2] = 1  # zeta (tendencia)\n","        R[2,3] = 1  # omega (estacional)\n","\n","        # Matriz de observación\n","        Z = np.zeros(state_dim)\n","        Z[0] = 1    # nivel\n","        Z[2] = 1    # componente estacional actual\n","\n","        # Inicialización\n","        a = np.zeros(state_dim)\n","        a[0] = y[0]\n","        P = np.eye(state_dim) * 10000\n","\n","        likelihood = 0\n","\n","        Q = np.diag([0, self.sigma2_eta, self.sigma2_zeta, self.sigma2_omega])\n","\n","        for t in range(n):\n","            # Predicción\n","            if t > 0:\n","                a = T @ filtered_state[t-1]\n","                P = T @ P @ T.T + R @ Q @ R.T\n","\n","            # Actualización\n","            v = y[t] - Z @ a\n","            F = Z @ P @ Z + self.sigma2_eps\n","            K = P @ Z / F\n","            filtered_state[t] = a + K * v\n","            P = P - np.outer(K, Z) @ P\n","\n","            predicted_state[t] = a\n","\n","            likelihood += -0.5 * (np.log(2*np.pi*F) + v**2/F)\n","\n","        return filtered_state, predicted_state, likelihood\n","\n","    def fit(self, y):\n","        \"\"\"\n","        # Estima los parámetros del modelo mediante máxima verosimilitud\n","        \"\"\"\n","        def objective(params):\n","            self.sigma2_eps = np.exp(params[0])\n","            self.sigma2_eta = np.exp(params[1])\n","            self.sigma2_zeta = np.exp(params[2])\n","            self.sigma2_omega = np.exp(params[3])\n","            _, _, likelihood = self.kalman_filter(y)\n","            return -likelihood\n","\n","        result = minimize(objective, x0=[0, 0, 0, 0], method='Nelder-Mead')\n","        self.sigma2_eps = np.exp(result.x[0])\n","        self.sigma2_eta = np.exp(result.x[1])\n","        self.sigma2_zeta = np.exp(result.x[2])\n","        self.sigma2_omega = np.exp(result.x[3])"],"metadata":{"id":"pFXJ8_dsgttZ","executionInfo":{"status":"ok","timestamp":1769018158919,"user_tz":300,"elapsed":37,"user":{"displayName":"LUIS ENRIQUE PUICON
